chunks.title: The Warrior from Edom
chunks.reason: A dialogue between an observer and Yahweh describing His victory over Edom.

chunks.title: Remembrance of Past Deliverance
chunks.reason: A speech recalling Yahweh's past compassion and deliverance of Israel from Egypt.

chunks.title: Prayer for Restoration
chunks.reason: A prayer asking Yahweh to look down from heaven and restore His people.
